texto: Squeeze this amazing human experience for all its nourishing juices. Take action towards the life you see for yourself. Don’t just look to the sky and beg for it
autor: put your feet on the ground and create it!
explicacao: Citação de put your feet on the ground and create it! sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Squeeze this amazing human experience for all its nourishing juices. Take action towards the life…” articula reflexao, steve-maraboli, squeeze em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
